note: AUD5 fix for finding F-13 (docs/flowmap/audit/04-findings.md). SCOPE: test-authoring — the AUD3-missing red chain IS the fix (T8).

intent.problem: AUD3 T8: loop-e2e was a pure happy-path spine — no stage was ever fed bad input, so F5 proved the loop RUNS, never that it STOPS.
intent.approach: a second chain in loop-e2e.test.mjs feeds an incoherent fixture plan (dangling dependsOn + modify targeting a nonexistent node) through the same stage order an orchestrating agent consumes: plan-check must block with exit 1, nothing downstream may execute, and no approval artifact may be emitted.
intent.rationale: the loop's value is the stop, not the run; asserting the executed-stage list proves the chain semantics (each stage runs only if the previous passed), not just one exit code.
